items.title: “A common thread clearly runs through each Mattei Plan project, which is the focus on education and training, because our goal is, not to create new dependencies, but rather to support African peoples [to play a key role], and to build opportunities for empowerment. And this is only possible if the development of human capital is placed at the heart of efforts, right from the early years of schooling”
“Greece is exciting with its diversity – from beach vacations to culture. Demand continues to increase dynamically. For us, Greece is one of the strategic growth markets in the Mediterranean,”

“From artificial intelligence applications to robotic solutions and end-to-end process automation, our IT teams are implementing significant initiatives in many areas. We expect to see the full impact of these investments over the next two years,”

"In my travels to Japan over the decades, I've been struck by the extraordinary beauty of its gardens, the serenity of its parks, and the enduring respect for nature. Even amid the modern architecture and commotion, there's a sense of peace,"
"Aus Europa heraus müssen Rückführungen wirksam durchgesetzt werden"

“Il fatto che questa legge abbia riconosciuto l’obesità come malattia cronica deve renderci orgogliosi. Siamo il primo paese al mondo a farlo e a porre delle proposte in sostegno a chi è obeso e sul tema della prevenzione. Il Consiglio Regionale è riuscito a coinvolgere tutti gli stakeholder e il mondo scientifico e accademico, con cui abbiamo condiviso la proposta di legge”
“L’Artico e le regioni polari sono ora al centro della scacchiera geopolitica. Il Rome Forum – Polar Dialogue arriva quindi in un momento storico”
«Nessuna richiesta sulle basi americane in territorio italiano»
